query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_registration,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.incident_location,
  c.incident_description,
  c.normalised_description,
  c.status,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE c.id IN (
  SELECT a.claim_id FROM ai_assessments a 
  WHERE a.id = 2010001
);
